data.title: Edison blames LA County and others for Eaton Fire, claiming they share liability for the devastation; equipment likely cause.
data.description: The Eaton Fire in Southern California is believed to have been ignited by equipment belonging to Southern California Edison. The company stated that while they were likely responsible for the fire, government agencies and other businesses also bore some liability for the significant damage caused.

data.title: VERSES AI Inc. restructures to focus on core target market, Jan. 16, 2026. Ticker: VERS, VRSSF. More resources to core markets.
data.description: Vancouver-based VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE: VERS) (OTCQB: VRSSF) has recently revealed a new corporate strategy aiming to streamline resources towards key markets and top-priority projects. The company, known for its expertise in advanced agentic software systems, shared this update on Jan. 16, 2026.

data.title: CompuChild expands AI and ML after-school programs for elementary and middle school students across US and Canada.
data.description: A children's education franchise known as CompuChild is increasing its offerings of AI and ML after-school programs for elementary and middle school students. This expansion, taking place in Dublin, California, is part of the company's commitment to providing after-school enrichment programs in the United States and Canada. The initiative is expected to benefit a significant number of students by providing them with access to cutting-edge technology and educational opportunities.

data.title: Korean companies thriving in US expansion with support from C&Y Engineering in multi-billion-dollar projects.
data.description: In the United States, Korean companies are rapidly expanding by establishing manufacturing plants in various regions, with a particular focus on the Midwest and Southeast. While news typically highlights factors such as investment amounts, job opportunities, and government assistance, one crucial element often overlooked is the essential support system essential for the success of these multi-billion-dollar ventures post-construction. C&Y Engineering emerges as a prominent player behind many of these projects, contributing to their fruition and operational efficiency.

data.title: WestJet, Canada's 2nd largest airline, reverses decision on non-reclining economy seats after viral backlash.
data.description: Canada's second-largest airline, WestJet, reversed course on a recent seating arrangement following the widespread circulation of videos showing packed passengers that garnered attention on social platforms.

data.title: Stellus Capital Investment Corp announces $0.34 quarterly dividend, payable monthly in $0.1133 increments.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Stellus Capital Investment Corporation declared a monthly dividend of $0.1133 per share for January, February, and March, totaling $0.34 per share for the first quarter. The Company's Board of Directors announced this dividend, which will be distributed to shareholders. Stellus Capital Investment Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SCM.

data.title: Stellus Private Credit BDC declares $0.35 Q1 2026 dividend, $0.1167 monthly in Jan, Feb, Mar.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Houston, Stellus Private Credit BDC made public that its Board of Trustees has approved a monthly dividend of $0.1167 for January, February, and March, resulting in a total of $0.35 per share for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend was declared as part of the regular operations of the Company.

data.title: Xcel Energy to review 2025 earnings on Feb 5, 2026, 9:00 a.m. Central Time, call in at 1-800-715-9871.
data.description: Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL) is set to hold a conference call on Thursday, February 5, 2026, to discuss their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The earnings report will be made public before the market opens on the same day, with the call scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. Those interested in joining the conference call should dial the U.S. Toll-Free number 1-800-715-9871 at least 10 minutes prior to the start time and adhere to the instructions provided by the operator.

data.title: SAGA Metals reports high-grade mineralization at Trapper North in Labrador from new drilling results.
data.description: SAGA has unveiled new assay findings from drilling efforts at Trapper North, reinforcing the presence of high-grade mineralization at the Radar Critical Minerals Project in Labrador. The latest results reveal significant mineralization levels and underscore the project's potential. This development highlights the project's viability with promising implications for the future.

data.title: LibertyStream offers $10,000,000 in non-brokered LIFE units at $1.10 each, with a Common Share and a Warrant per Unit.
data.description: Dallas-based LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. (TSXV: LIB | OTCQB: VLTLF | FSE: I2D) has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of units at $1.10 per Unit, aiming to raise up to $10,000,000 in total proceeds. Each Unit will consist of one Common Share and one whole Warrant. The Offering presents an opportunity for investors to participate in the Company's growth as it continues to focus on critical minerals.

data.title: PJM Board in Valley Forge, PA, sets plans to integrate large loads reliably in 2026 to balance system needs and affordability.
data.description: In Valley Forge, Pennsylvania, on January 16, 2026, the PJM Board of Managers announced plans to address the integration of new data by proposing various actions to be implemented throughout the year. These proposals aim to strike a balance between meeting system requirements and ensuring affordability for consumers. The initiatives are set to tackle the challenges associated with incorporating new information into the system. This strategic approach underscores the commitment to effective decision-making in the energy sector.

data.title: Checkbook appoints Pia Thompson and Aditya Raikar as Co-CEOs, succeeding founder PJ Gupta for growth strategy.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Checkbook, a prominent digital payment solutions provider, has appointed Pia Thompson and Aditya Raikar as Co-Chief Executive Officers. This leadership change, effective immediately, sees Thompson and Raikar taking over from founder PJ Gupta. Gupta, the former CEO, has opted to pass on the torch to new leadership to facilitate the Company's future expansion. While Gupta will retain his position as Executive Chairman of Checkbook’s Board, he will also explore new opportunities. This strategic move is aimed at steering the company into its next phase of growth.

data.title: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp announces securities transactions in Toronto, Ontario and Nucla, Colorado.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp announced important updates for stakeholders. Headquartered in Toronto, Ontario and Nucla, Colorado, the company trades as WUC on the CSE and as WSTRF on the OTCQX.
Sheri Biggs revealed recent stock transactions.
Debbie Dingell reports recent stock trades, including VSNT.
Suzan DelBene reports recent stock transactions.

data.title: Christina Lake Cannabis (CSE: CLC) sold 99 acres of land in BC for $551,000 to boost working capital.
data.description: Christina Lake Cannabis Corp. recently announced the sale of 99 acres of non-core land located in Christina Lake, British Columbia. The sale yielded $551,000 which will be allocated towards supporting the company's working capital.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics grants 97,710 stock options to 17 new employees on Jan 15, 2026, focusing on TIL therapies for cancer.
data.description: On Jan. 16, 2026, in SAN CARLOS, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA), a biotech firm specializing in pioneering polyclonal TIL therapies for cancer patients, revealed the approval on Jan. 15, 2026, of granting inducement stock options. This encompasses 97,710 shares of the Company's common stock, distributed among 17 fresh non-executive hires.

data.title: Speakeasy Dispensary in Lexington, KY received a strong turnout on opening day for medical cannabis program. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Kentucky's medical cannabis program reached a significant milestone as Speakeasy Dispensary began serving registered patients in Lexington on January 15, 2026. The operation saw a strong turnout of patients eager to access medical cannabis products. The efficient opening highlighted the success of the program, indicating growing support and demand. This development reflects the progress and positive impact of Kentucky's initiative, with notable numbers of patients benefiting from the accessible medical cannabis options now available to them.
Rick Larsen reports new stock trades with WM, ESS, VRSK, and MDLZ.
